title: Cryptool platform is officially live on mainnet
content_html:
Cryptool is officially live on mainnet with Groups, Raise and GDS.

In parallel, MultiversX has publicly announced their support for Cryptool. The full statement is on the MultiversX X account.

With the platform live, this is the moment to onboard your friends and your community through the referral program. The marketing push kicks off across our channels from today, with regular updates to follow.
author: Cryptool
